entity.label: Jerubbesheth
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Contender with the shame; i.e., idol, a surname also of Gideon (2 Sam. 11:21).

nodes.label: Jerubbesheth
nodes.description: Contender with the shame; i.e., idol, a surname also of Gideon (2 Sam. 11:21).

verses.text: Who smote Abimelech the son of Jerubbesheth? did not a woman cast a piece of a millstone upon him from the wall, that he died in Thebez? why went ye nigh the wall? then say thou, Thy servant Uriah the Hittite is dead also.
